   - As you move into the living room, keep heading towards the archway that leads to the hallway.

5. **Turn Left:**
   - At the end of the hallway, turn left. You will see a door on your left side.

6. **Enter the Bathroom:**
   - Open the door on your left and enter the bathroom. You will see a sink, a toilet, and a shower area.

By following these steps, you should be able to navigate from the dining table to the bathroom successfully.
